qualityPolicy.notes: Checklist A high-density rewrite: every development round applies >=2 deterministic regex patches

executionHints.description: High-density D rounds: two deterministic patches per round on current preclass.c shape

d1ResetRequirement.notes: When run range includes D1, explicit reset avoids stale invocation state

D1.description: High-density observe-path refactor for reason/confidence helper layering

operations.pattern: static const char\* wc_preclass_observe_reason_key\(const char\* reason\)\r?\n\{[\s\S]*?\r?\n\}

D2.description: High-density match-layer labeling refactor with explicit output helper

D4.description: High-density special-result dispatch refactor for v4/v6 paths

operations.pattern:
static void wc_preclass_set_v4_special_result\(const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence,?
		const char\* reason_value\)?
\{[\s\S]*??
\}

static void wc_preclass_set_v6_special_result\(const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence,?
		const char\* reason_value\)?
\{[\s\S]*??
\}
